visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins in a brightly lit warehouse retail environment. A female with long black hair, wearing a white knit cardigan over a white lace dress and carrying a small white crossbody bag, stands next to a white chest freezer. She smiles and gestures with her right hand while looking at the camera. In the background, aisles of electronics, including TVs and washing machines, are visible under bright studio-style lighting. (2) The camera moves closer to focus on the top of the white chest freezer. The brand name 'LIEBHERR' is clearly visible on the silver metallic handle. The woman's right hand, adorned with a pearl ring, rests on the sliding glass lid. The background remains the bustling warehouse interior with other shoppers faintly visible in the distance. (3) The shot returns to a medium framing of the woman as she continues to talk and gesture towards the appliance. She leans slightly forward, her facial expression animated and engaging. To her right, a shopping cart with a green child seat is partially visible. (4) A close-up shot shows her sliding the glass lid of the freezer open and then shut, demonstrating its functionality. The reflection of the overhead warehouse lights glints on the smooth glass surface. (5) The woman leans her arms on the freezer, looking directly into the camera with a cheerful expression. Graphic overlays with price and capacity information appear on the screen, momentarily partially obscuring the background racks of appliances.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (1) [Variety]: 卧室冷凍櫃. (1) [Subtitle]: 我要. (2) [Subtitle]: 你是要藏到這裡面嗎? 卧室冷凍櫃哇. (3) [Slogan]: 售價含運送到家. (3) [Subtitle]: 14,499元它的大小比我想像中的可愛哎. (4) [Subtitle]: 做工呢整體呢比一般那種小賣部或者火鍋店霜淇淋區看到的可愛. (5) [Variety]: 107公升. (5) [Subtitle]: 看這一個哎呦這個材質很美耶. (6) [Subtitle]: 其實我覺得是OK啦雖然它沒有直立. (7) [Subtitle]: 等一下它這個是椅子嗎就是讓你坐在裡面. (8) [Subtitle]: 讓你可以放在卧室坐在裡面不用開冷氣哎. (9) [Variety]: 107公升. (9) [Subtitle]: 你覺得值得嗎 107公升那它的玻璃推拉好拉嗎? 划算就是如果我朋友家放這個我會想買冰棒放他家. (10) [Variety]: 冷凍櫃. (10) [Subtitle]: 哇所以如果你很愛來好市多的人直接買一個回去因為你絕對缺冷凍櫃. (11) [Subtitle]: 它只是沒有立式那麽時尚但是它感覺比較省空好像可以放更多哈.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character in the foreground; approximately 3 distant passers-by visible in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long, straight black hair, wearing a cream-colored knit cardigan over a white lace-patterned dress, carrying a white luxury-style small bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large-scale warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and rows of consumer electronics and household appliances like refrigerators and washing machines.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with a bright, friendly tone, introducing the product. Low-volume upbeat acoustic-pop background music sets a positive mood. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as a text overlay appears on screen. The female voice remains energetic. (3) A male voice briefly chimes in off-camera with a inquisitive, casual remark, suggesting a dialogue. (4) The female voice continues with a moderate tempo, laughing slightly, while the faint mechanical sliding of a glass lid is heard in the mix. (5) Another 'pop' sound effect occurs as technical details like the price are mentioned. (6) The video concludes with the female speaker giving a final enthusiastic recommendation, while the music maintains a steady rhythmic beat until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Feature Demo -> Price/Capacity Disclosure -> Personal Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a product review and recommendation for a Liebherr chest freezer found at Costco Wholesale, focusing on its design, size, and practicality for household use.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While recommending a specific brand, the video adopts the style of a personal vlog or shopping find rather than a formal paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media short-form editing with variety-show captions to make a mundane appliance review engaging.
